_comment: Claim-fidelity spec for the gather skill: does a real `/charness:gather` run honor its own central claims — route to its references at the point of need, prefer the primary source, and stop honestly? gather ships a deterministic planner (`gather_plan.py`); per the methodology lens 1 the RCF is derived from the planner's UNCONDITIONAL `_required_reads`, which for any non-twitter/reddit route are exactly source-priority.md + capability-contract.md (the twitter/reddit branch adds support/web-fetch/routing-table.md, which is not a gather reference and so out of scope here). adapter-contract.md and gather-provider.md are NOT in the planner's required reads: the bootstrap resolves the adapter via resolve_adapter.py and the provider mode VALUE comes from that resolved adapter, so both are script-resolved (lens 3) — adapter-contract.md stays engage-always (adapter readiness is unconditional) but is not an RCF floor, and gather-provider.md is on-demand (only a provider-backed, non-public source consults it). The prompt is pinned to a representative public-URL gather (gather needs a source URL; bare /charness:gather cannot run the planner). The run reaches the planner/reference-routing phase before any network fetch, so the RCF is exercised even if the source is unreachable. Skill fix shipped with this calibration: gather_plan.py now detects provider-backed hosts (Slack/Google Workspace) and redirects the agent to the right adviser via source_owner + next_action instead of silently planning a generic public fetch (north star: the script briefs the judge). declaredReferences drives a coverage report. referenceEngagement classifies each reference on the engage-always/on-demand/gate-sufficient axis from the locked methodology contract (charness-artifacts/spec/2026-06-23-skill-claim-fidelity-doc-philosophy.md). thresholds are intentionally omitted until a first baseline capture sets a per-skill runtime budget.
prompt: /charness:gather https://docs.python.org/3/library/asyncio-task.html 페이지를 durable 지식 자산으로 수집해줘 — 나중 세션이 asyncio 태스크 스케줄링 API(create_task / gather / wait_for 타임아웃 / 취소 전파)를 다시 페치하지 않고 참조할 수 있도록, 1차 출처 식별을 지키면서.

adapter-contract.md.rationale: The bootstrap resolves the adapter via resolve_adapter.py on every run (artifact location + current-pointer mechanics + provider modes), so adapter readiness is unconditional; but the run reads the resolved adapter output, not this explainer doc, so it is engage-always yet not an RCF floor (lens 3, script-resolved).

asset-refresh.md.rationale: Provides the specific mechanics for safely writing dated records and refreshing the current pointer, only consulted when writing the result.
asset-refresh.md.trigger: When ready to write the durable asset to disk in step 4, ensuring symlink-aware pointer refresh and dated record handling.

browser-mediated-private-sources.md.rationale: Provides the decision ladder and artifact notes for browser-mediated fallback, a specific escalation path only taken when stronger routes are exhausted.
browser-mediated-private-sources.md.trigger: When the user provides a private SaaS URL and both official API/export and host-mediated paths are unavailable or insufficient.

capability-contract.md.rationale: A planner UNCONDITIONAL required read: defines the access-mode decision ladder (grant/binary/env/public/human-only/degraded), trace preservation, and clean-stop behavior the run applies to interpret the acquisition result — judgment the script does not resolve.

document-seams.md.rationale: Suggests checking for existing repo-specific knowledge surfaces before defaulting to charness-artifacts/gather/; only relevant if the repo has established one.
document-seams.md.trigger: When the repo has a custom checked-in knowledge surface (docs folder, references directory, knowledge folder) that should override the default artifact location.

gather-provider.md.rationale: The provider mode VALUE is resolved from the adapter by the bootstrap; this doc explains the direct-cli/host-mediated/none modes and is consulted only when acquiring a provider-backed (non-public) source, not on a public-URL gather where no provider is involved.
gather-provider.md.trigger: When the source needs a direct-cli or host-mediated provider mode (Slack, Notion, Google Workspace, or other provider-backed source) rather than a public URL.

google-workspace-access.md.rationale: Directs operator to use the workspace path adviser script and defines the preference order (host-mediated > operator export > browser-mediated), only consulted for Google sources.
google-workspace-access.md.trigger: When the source is identified as Google Docs, Drive, Sheets, or Slides content requiring access beyond a public URL.

source-priority.md.rationale: A planner UNCONDITIONAL required read and the skill's step 1: identify which source to gather from, keep primary-source identity explicit, and do not widen into search or substitute a derivative — judgment the script does not resolve.
